description: Curated pre-made scheduled-job prompts for open-claude-cron. Browse by category or tags; ask Claude to copy one into your scheduled-jobs directory to install.

jobs.name: daily-verify
jobs.one_line: Daily MCP-surface health check posted to your choice of Slack/Discord/Jira/Gmail/local file.

requires.mcps: at least one of: Slack, Discord, Jira, Gmail (OR none if you use local-file mode)
setup: Edit the prompt body to pick ONE destination (marked in the template comment).
Fill in channel ID / ticket key / recipient for your chosen destination.

jobs.name: downloads-triage
jobs.one_line: Fires when new files land in ~/Downloads (60s quiet period). Categorizes and suggests destinations; logs to a feed file.
jobs.schedule: event-driven (file_added external trigger); debounced to at most once per 5 minutes

setup: Optional: change the watched path or quiet_seconds window.
Optional: point the feed file somewhere other than the default.
